glosses.vi: áo choàng tắm; áo choàng ở nhà
glosses.ja: バスローブ; ガウン

translations.he: אני לוקח את חלוק הרחצה שלי.
translations.ja: バスローブを手に取ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb agreeing with the subject 'Je'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular form modifying 'peignoir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'prends'.

sentences.target: Tu as oublié ton peignoir au vestiaire.
sentences.reading: /ty a u.bli.je tɔ̃ pɛ.ɲwaʁ o vɛs.tjɛʁ/

translations.fr: Tu as oublié ton peignoir au vestiaire.
translations.ipa: /ty a u.bli.je tɔ̃ pɛ.ɲwaʁ o vɛs.tjɛʁ/
translations.en: You forgot your bathrobe in the locker room.
translations.es: Olvidaste tu bata de baño en el vestuario.
translations.de: Du hast deinen Bademantel in der Umkleide vergessen.
translations.it: Hai dimenticato il tuo accappatoio nello spogliatoio.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把浴袍忘在更衣室了。
translations.yue: 你喺更衣室度遺低咗你嘅浴袍。
translations.ru: Ты забыл свой халат в раздевалке.
translations.pt: Você esqueceu seu roupão no vestiário.
translations.he: שכחת את חלוק הרחצה שלך בחדר ההלבשה.
translations.vi: Bạn quên áo choàng tắm ở phòng thay đồ rồi.
translations.ar: لقد نسيت روب الحمام الخاص بك في غرفة تبديل الملابس.
translations.nl: Je bent je badjas vergeten in de kleedkamer.
translations.uk: Ти забув свій халат у роздягальні.
translations.hi: तुम अपना बाथरोब चेंजिंग रूम में भूल गए.
translations.el: Ξέχασες το μπουρνούζι σου στα αποδυτήρια.
translations.nb: Du glemte morgenkåpen din i garderoben.
translations.id: Kamu ketinggalan jubah mandi di ruang ganti.
translations.sv: Du glömde din morgonrock i omklädningsrummet.
translations.ro: Ți-ai uitat halatul de baie în vestiar.
translations.da: Du glemte din badekåbe i omklædningsrummet.
translations.ja: 更衣室にバスローブを忘れてたよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the passé composé with the past participle 'oublié'.
Past participle of the verb; main lexical verb in a compound tense with 'as'. Masculine singular form; with 'avoir' it does not agree with a following direct object.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; masculine singular form modifying 'peignoir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'oublié'.
Preposition meaning 'at/to'; contraction of 'à' + 'le'. Introduces the prepositional phrase 'au vestiaire'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

translations.it: Il suo accappatoio è ancora bagnato.
translations.ko: 그 사람의 가운은 아직 젖어 있어요.
translations.pt: O roupão dele ainda está molhado.
translations.vi: Áo choàng tắm của người đó vẫn còn ướt.
translations.ar: روب الحمام الخاص به ما زال مبللًا.
translations.hi: उनका बाथरोब अभी भी गीला है.
translations.el: Το μπουρνούζι του είναι ακόμα βρεγμένο.
translations.ja: その人のバスローブはまだ濡れています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; masculine singular form modifying 'peignoir' (possessor gender is unspecified).
Common noun, masculine singular; grammatical subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb modifying the predicate; indicates continuity of the state.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; describes the state of 'peignoir'.

sentences.target: On achète un peignoir pour le spa.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a.ʃɛt œ̃ pɛ.ɲwaʁ puʁ lə spa/

translations.fr: On achète un peignoir pour le spa.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a.ʃɛt œ̃ pɛ.ɲwaʁ puʁ lə spa/
translations.en: We're buying a bathrobe for the spa.
translations.es: Estamos comprando una bata de baño para el spa.
translations.de: Wir kaufen einen Bademantel für das Spa.
translations.it: Compriamo un accappatoio per la spa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要买一件去水疗用的浴袍。
translations.yue: 我哋買件去水療用嘅浴袍。
translations.pt: Estamos comprando um roupão para o spa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang mua một áo choàng tắm cho spa.
translations.nl: We kopen een badjas voor de spa.
translations.hu: Veszünk egy fürdőköntöst a spa számára.
translations.hi: हम स्पा के लिए एक बाथरोब खरीद रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αγοράζουμε ένα μπουρνούζι για το σπα.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper en morgenkåpe til spaet.
translations.id: Kami membeli jubah mandi untuk spa.
translations.sv: Vi köper en morgonrock till spat.
translations.ro: Cumpărăm un halat de baie pentru spa.
translations.da: Vi køber en badekåbe til spaet.
translations.ja: スパ用のバスローブを買っています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; commonly used in spoken French with 3rd person singular verb agreement to mean 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb agreeing with 'On'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'peignoir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'achète'.
Preposition introducing a purpose or beneficiary; heads the prepositional phrase 'pour le spa'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'spa'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.
